characters.name: Chris Riley
characters.description: No Title No information Christine Riley best known as 'Chris' runs the Imperial Hotel in Mt. Thomas, where the cops go to have a drink and a good talk after work. Chris had a brief relationship with Constable Adam Cooper. Chris was married to Terry but run off with another woman in season one. Terry came to Mt. Thomas and got thought Chris' widow after Chris thought he died.
